import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { NgIcon, provideIcons } from '@ng-icons/core'; import { lucideCloudUpload, lucideX } from '@ng-icons/lucide'; import { HlmButton } from '@spartan-ng/helm/button'; import { HlmIcon } from '@spartan-ng/helm/icon'; import { HlmProgress, HlmProgressIndicator } from '@spartan-ng/helm/progress'; @Component({ selector: 'sim-notification-25', providers: [ provideIcons({ lucideX, lucideCloudUpload, }), ], imports: [NgIcon, HlmIcon, HlmButton, HlmProgressIndicator, HlmProgress], template: `

Uploading ‘my-avatar.png’

Please wait while we upload your file.

`, }) export class Notification25Component {}
